task: Conduct a comprehensive literature review on Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting, covering seminal papers, key concepts, and evolution.
Survey major applications and benchmark tasks where CoT prompting shows significant improvements, including arithmetic, symbolic reasoning, and others.
Analyze major variants of CoT prompting (e.g., self-consistency, least-to-most, tree-of-thought, etc.), describing mechanisms and comparative performance.
Compile practical guidelines and prompt engineering tips for effective CoT prompting based on the research findings.
Synthesize all findings into a cohesive markdown document summarizing CoT prompting research, including sections for literature, applications, variants, and guidelines.
